pair_constraints.{L2,L1,L0}: RANK DEFICIENT — a_n = T_n - 2*down_sum: exact linear dependence.
pair_constraints.{L5,L3,L0}: TARGET LEAKAGE — a_n post-decision: is_down = int(a_n == candidate).
pair_constraints.{c530,c210}: Non-consecutive digit groups {5,3,0} and {2,1,0}: no staircase basis, digit-5 rare for n<=200k, overlap only at digit 0.

interpretation.auc_full_predecision: All pre-decision features incl. prev_is_down. Near 1.0 due to alternation (phase-slip rate ~0.001).
interpretation.auc_without_prev_is_down: Pre-decision arithmetic features only — no alternation signal. Should be ~0.5-0.6.
interpretation.auc_oracle_visited_set: Oracle using visited-set collision flag. AUC=1.0 (perfect but requires full visited-set knowledge — not causal from local features).
